instructions: Copy this file into workspace/PROJECT.json before filling in a new project.
Replace every placeholder with project-specific content.
Keep this file focused on project metadata, phase, audience, emotional target, and active model choices.
concept: Replace with a concise description of the film, campaign, sequence, or creative assignment.
intendedAudience: Replace with the audience or viewing context this project is designed for.
targetEmotionalEffect: Replace with the intended emotional result for the viewer.
workingAssumptions: Replace with an assumption that guides the project until it is confirmed or revised.
Replace with another assumption that affects creative or production decisions.
